Parameters.Name: VirtualPath
Parameters.Label: Virtual path
Parameters.HelpText: The full path to the virtual directory you wish to create. Do not include the application (if any) the directory will be created under. The path, not including the virtual directory itself must already exist. Eg. If the virtual directory is to be created under `myapp/someFolder/myVdir` enter: `someFolder/myVdir`.

Parameters.Name: ApplicationName
Parameters.Label: Application
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the IIS application to create the virtual directory under (not required).

Parameters.Name: PhysicalPath
Parameters.Label: Physical path
Parameters.HelpText: Physical folder that the application will serve files from. Example: `C:\MyApp`.

Parameters.Name: CreatePhysicalPath
Parameters.Label: Create Physical Path (If not exists)
Parameters.HelpText: Create the physical path if it does not exist.

Parameters.Name: ParentSite
Parameters.Label: Parent site
Parameters.HelpText:
The name of the IIS web site to attach the application to. For example, to put the application under the default web site, enter:

    Default Web Site
